word: G2113 - εὐθυδρομέω - euthydroméō - yoo-thoo-drom-eh'-o - With a straight course

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: With a straight course
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to make a straight course, run a straight course
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G2117 and G1408; to lay a straight course, that is, sail direct: - (come) with a straight course.
